notes: Mordecai grants Carl the Crawler Menu and walks him through it. His stats are shown for the first time (Str 6, Int 3, Con 5, Dex 5, Cha 4 — a typical human averages 3-5). He gets 3 stat points per level but cannot distribute them until he picks a race and class on Floor 3. The all-important Ratings menu (Views/Followers/Favorites/Patrons, all 0 until Floor 2) is explained, along with health, the skills list, and the magic menu — which grants a basic Level-1 healing spell and a 3-point mana pool (Int 3).

add.name: Unarmed Combat
add.description: Hand-to-hand fighting proficiency from Carl's Coast Guard training.

add.name: Basic Electrical Repair
add.description: Carl's highest starting skill, from his work as a marine electrical tech.

add.name: Basic Heal (spell)
add.description: A Level-1 healing spell placed in hotlist slot 1; heals about 20% of health and costs 2 mana.

sources.quote: According to Mordecai, I couldn’t directly adjust these stats. Not yet. I received three stat points every time I leveled up, but I couldn’t distribute them until I picked a race and class.
I was given a simple healing spell and a pool of mana points ... Because my intelligence was only three, I only had three magic points. The healing spell cost two.
What was left was things like Unarmed Combat: 3, Basic Electrical Repair: 6, Swimming: 4. Nothing was over five other than Electrical Repair.
